name: Kiwi Baby
tagline: Every little thing is worth exploring!
shortDescription: Kiwi Baby is a gentle, fresh, and cheerful character who embodies the sweetness of nature and the joy of curiosity. With a heart full of kindness and a love for simple moments, Kiwi Baby brings calm, happiness, and a sense of wonder to the Fruit Baby Universe, inspiring friendship, positivity, and connection in every adventure.
about: Chubby, rounded anthropomorphic kiwi character. Fuzzy kiwi-brown body with a subtle green undertone for a fresh, natural look. Sliced kiwi top showing vibrant green flesh with black seeds. Leaf crown and white kiwi blossom accent. Large warm brown eyes with highlights. Pink blush cheeks and a small smiling mouth. Short rounded arms and feet. Friendly, gentle, and kawaii expression.
personality: Fresh & Natural — inspired by real kiwi fruit; fresh, wholesome, and full of life
Kind & Cheerful — spreads positivity, happiness, and gentle friendship
Curious & Playful — loves exploring new things and making new friends
Gentle & Caring — a sweet companion who brings comfort and joy

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Fuzzy kiwi-brown body with a subtle green undertone for a fresh, natural look. Sliced kiwi top showing vibrant green flesh with black seeds. Leaf crown and white kiwi blossom accent. Large warm brown eyes with highlights. Pink blush cheeks and a small smiling mouth.

storyRole: The gentle peacemaker and nature guide. Kiwi Baby helps the group stay grounded, notice small beautiful things, and find calm during busy adventures.

always: Notice and appreciate the small things
never: Overlook a friend who needs support

signatureStyle: Fresh, cheerful, and full of wonder. Kiwi Baby brings calm, happiness, and a sense of wonder to every adventure.
brandPositioning: Kiwi Baby is a gentle, fresh, and cheerful character who embodies the sweetness of nature and the joy of curiosity. With a heart full of kindness and a love for simple moments, Kiwi Baby brings calm, happiness, and a sense of wonder to the Fruit Baby Universe, inspiring friendship, positivity, and connection in every adventure.
catchphrases: Every little thing is worth exploring!
We can figure it out together — slowly and sweetly.
